action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 80.32% from iteration 4 (ConvNeXt + mixup/LS/EMA). Self-training in iteration 6 didn't improve (val_acc=0.5978 vs 0.5992). Analysis: The key issue is 40% label noise. Self-training with soft labels was too uncertain (mean confidence 0.41). A more principled approach is needed: use cleanlab (pre-installed) to identify noisy samples, then train with sample reweighting + label correction on high-confidence disagreements. Decision: Implement cleanlab noise detection + sample reweighting + strong augmentation training. Save old best.pt as backup, train new model, and submit eval.
